Sun: Represents identity, ego, self-expression and vitality.
Moon: Represents emotions, inner world, intuition and nurturing energy.
Mars: Represents ambition, drive, assertiveness and conflict.
Venus: Represents love, harmony, relationships and art.
Mercury: Represents communication, logic, travel and intelligence.
Jupiter: Represents wisdom, growth, fortune and knowledge.
Saturn: Represents discipline, responsibility, boundaries and lessons.
